parents.subject: LU-10401 tests: add -F so list_param prints entry type

commit.subject: LU-13601 llite: OBD_ALLOC_LARGE for ll_sb_info
commit.message:
LU-13601 llite: OBD_ALLOC_LARGE for ll_sb_info

struct ll_sb_info needs an order 4 page allocation,
which fails if memory is fragmented.
Changing OBD_ALLOC_PTR to OBD_ALLOC_LARGE allows to
fail back to vmalloc() if kmalloc() fails.

HPE-bug-id: LUS-8903
Change-Id: Ia4a925bb074723140fabd5083df02225c8f9bb5c
Signed-off-by: Alexander Zarochentsev <alexander.zarochentsev@hpe.com>
